title: Karnataka High Court slams media trial in Renukaswamy murder case despite gag order
description: The Karnataka High Court on Thursday flagged serious concerns about sensationalised media reporting on the Renukaswamy murder case, including on the prime accused, Kannada actor Darshan Thogudeepa.Justice Sachin Shankar Magadum questioned how media coverage can be regulated in such matters."How to deal with these people (media outlets, social media). They are parallely holding a media trial. What is the remedy actually? There is already a gag order," he observed.The Court went on to reserve its
